const translations = {
  en: {
    title: "EarthPulse AI",
    reportPollution: "Report Pollution",
    liveReports: "Live Reports",
    aqiPredictions: "AQI Predictions",
    home: "Home",
    contactUs: "Contact Us",

    citizen: "Citizen",
    pollutionControl: "Pollution Control",
    admin: "Admin",
    submitReport: "Submit Report",
    pollutionType: "Pollution Type (e.g. Smoke, Dust)",
    address: "Address / Landmark",
    city: "City",
    state: "State",
    description: "Description",
    anonymous: "Report Anonymously",
    generateAIForecast: "Generate AI Forecast",

  hi: {
    title: "अर्थपल्स AI",
    reportPollution: "प्रदूषण की रिपोर्ट करें",

    home: "होम",
    contactUs: "संपर्क करें",
    login: "लॉगिन",
    logout: "लॉगआउट",

    grievances: "शिकायतें",
    authorityPanel: "प्राधिकरण पैनल",

    pollutionControl: "प्रदूषण नियंत्रण",

    submitReport: "रिपोर्ट जमा करें",
    pollutionType: "प्रदूषण का प्रकार (जैसे धुआं, धूल)",
    address: "पता / लैंडमार्क",
    city: "शहर",
    state: "राज्य",
    description: "विवरण",
    anonymous: "गुमनाम रूप से रिपोर्ट करें",

module.exports = translations;
